name: Marine Wildlife Data Analyst
text:
Marine Wildlife Data Analyst
We are looking for a Marine Wildlife Data Analyst to analyze GPS tracking data collected from tagged sea turtles, dolphins, and whales. The role involves identifying migration patterns, detecting anomalies in movement data, validating sensor accuracy, and generating ecological reports for conservation teams.

Responsibilities:
- Analyze animal movement datasets.
- Detect abnormal migration behavior.
- Validate GPS and sensor data quality.
- Build statistical summaries and visual reports.
- Collaborate with marine biologists to interpret findings.

name: Python Developer (Fresher)
text:
Python Developer (Fresher)
Phát triển và bảo trì API bằng Python, tham gia xây dựng backend, làm việc với cơ sở dữ liệu, hỗ trợ sửa lỗi và phối hợp với nhóm frontend.
